subject: Design: Event type system and parsers
description:
Design type system for interactive events based on discovery findings.

Dependencies: Task 4 complete (analysis done)

Design components:
1. Event type hierarchy (UserEvent subtypes)
2. Parser functions for each event type
3. Error handling for malformed events
4. Type guards and validation

Files to design:
- internal/cli/events.go (new types)
- Design patterns for extensibility

Deliverable:
- Go type definitions for all interactive event types
- Parser function signatures
- Validation logic design
- Example usage code

Acceptance:
- [ ] Type hierarchy designed and documented
- [ ] Parser functions specified
- [ ] Validation approach defined
- [ ] Code examples written
- [ ] Follows go.md conventions (small interfaces, explicit errors)
